ops.title: Phase-2 pack migrations: grep/rg rewrite lane + json wrap per-occurrence
ops.description: Droppable follow-ups from the per-occurrence rollout: grep_guards/rg_guards rewrite lane is is_single_command-gated (compound lines block wholesale where a splice could rewrite the grep and keep the rest) — flood-judging is already per-occurrence and maps onto block_if; json_guards wrap is a coverage gain on compound lines. Requires capt-hook >= 9.14.0 (rewrite_command_occurrences). Do NOT touch approval_guards CcxReadOnlyCli (is_single_command is load-bearing) or ccx_repipe_rewrites (operator-consuming).

ops.text: grep/rg rewrite lane runs per-occurrence via rewrite_command_occurrences with flood-judging mapped to block_if; all existing inline rows stay green
json_guards wrap applies per occurrence on compound lines
